name: Shootmon
description: A Machine Digimon that evolved via the data of various ball games from around the world. With a cannon in one hand capable of shooting all kinds of balls, it plans to popularize ball games throughout the Digital World . Shootmon is nicknamed the " Laughing Oni Coach " by Digimon that fear it because it approaches them with a smiling face that never changes whether it is angry or happy. Its Special Moves are shooting balls from its cannon at speeds exceeding 300 km/h ( Cannonball Shooter ), and charging into the enemy by capitalizing on its elastic, spring-like legs ( Wild Pitch ). Also, Digimon who suffer its " Round Jail ", where it turns anything it touches into a ball without wasting its breath, are mercilessly shot out of its cannon.
